text:
A is a ring of energy that mainly appears in the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Halos appear to represent "divine" (i.e. supernatural and/or abnormally powerful) manifestations, such as the power of an Angel or the awakening of an Evangelion.

Neon Genesis Evangelion

The halo motif is put to limited use in the original series. Most notably, one forms over the head of Unit-00 as it transitions into a giant Rei, moments before self-destructing.

In tradition

Halos are a Christian visual motif associated with angels and holy figures (such as Jesus Christ).
